name: eliis-media-importer
description: CLI tool that fetches ELIIS guardian-feed data, extracts media metadata, and stores request history + media files in SQLite.
comment: Zero runtime dependencies: uses Node's built-in node:sqlite, node:test, and native TypeScript type-stripping. Requires Node >= 22.5 (node:sqlite); developed/tested on Node 24. devDependencies are OPTIONAL and only needed for `npm run typecheck`.
